meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve slow development speed (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome slow development speed. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup: Solve Slow Dev Speed (Advanced Guide)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with slow development. Master Claude Code and Antigravity to ship production-grade software faster. An advanced checklist for AI builders.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development cycles, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate boilerplate and architectural scaffolding. By leveraging autonomous agentic workflows, you transition from manual syntax typing to high-level system orchestration, reducing your time-to-market by 80% while ensuring codebase consistency and professional-grade software architecture patterns.
content.intro:
The modern developer’s greatest enemy is the friction between thought and deployment. You sit down to build, but you are quickly buried under a mountain of boilerplate, configuration drift, and tedious debugging sessions that sap your creative energy. You aren't coding; you are fighting the machine, and your velocity is suffering because of it.

It is time to change your trajectory. By mastering the interplay between Claude Code and Antigravity, you move from being a student struggling with syntax to an architect commanding a fleet of AI assistants. This is not just a tutorial; it is a blueprint for reclaiming your time and building the portfolio that will define your career.

steps.title: Environment Orchestration
steps.description: Establish a clean, isolated environment to ensure agentic stability. This prevents dependency conflicts that stall development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a professional SaaS project structure using Next.js 15, Tailwind, and Supabase with strict TypeScript enforcement.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map out your domain models before writing logic to ensure modularity and scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a domain-driven design schema for a multi-tenant user authentication and subscription billing system.

steps.title: Autonomous Feature Injection
steps.description: Offload the implementation of complex business logic to Claude Code while you oversee the integration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the user registration flow with Zod validation and server-side error handling.

steps.title: Automated Testing Suites
steps.description: Never ship broken code. Automate unit and integration test generation to maintain velocity without sacrificing quality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create comprehensive Vitest suites for the newly implemented auth services, covering edge cases and security headers.

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Sync
steps.description: Connect your local development workflow to a CI/CD pipeline to ensure your progress is continuously validated.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a GitHub Actions pipeline that triggers linting, type-checking, and tests on every push.

pro_tips: Always define your 'Definition of Done' in your Claude system prompt to prevent the agent from over-engineering simple features.
Use Antigravity to generate 'Project Context' files; agents perform 30% better when they understand your architectural constraints.
Keep your Claude Code sessions scoped to single features to avoid hallucinations caused by context window saturation.
Force-enable strict TypeScript modes in your config; it acts as a guardrail for AI-generated code, catching type mismatches early.
Review AI-generated pull requests as if you were a lead engineer—never blindly merge code without a quick logic audit.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is configured, commit your current progress to a new repository and begin iterating on a specific feature branch. Track your 'time-to-first-feature' to measure your efficiency gains.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the same tooling that top-tier engineers use to ship at enterprise speed. Stop waiting for the 'perfect' time to start. Your portfolio won't build itself, and your future career depends on the velocity you establish today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
